datawizardprofile.name: 01_PL_AGAT_RHD_OrderInterface_OrderImport_RHDPoland
datawizardprofile.history_note: [Oct 7, 2023, 12:43 PM] admradach: Phase 6 AW 2 unchecked Gesamten Job als gescheitert ... [22.02.2022 16:24] admkrotki: Anlage im PROD [19.10.2021 09:07] admwarth: created

node.description: Unique message id, for example the sequence number of the senders system or a timestamp
node.name: MessageId

node.description: Date and time of this message
node.name: MessageDate

node.description: Abbreviation of the client. This must map to a client as listed in the master data at RHD.
node.name: Client

node.description: Choose the relevant process type for this order.
node.name: ProcessType

node.description: Goods should be picked from stock available RHD warehouse.
node.name: Consignment-1_choice_1

node.description: Specify the code of the RHD warehouse where the goods should be picked.
node.name: Warehouse

node.description: The type of the location.
node.name: LocationType

node.description: Code of the location.
node.name: LocationCode

node.description: Goods will be delivered to a RHD hub location which will forward the goods to the RHD location which is responsible for delivering to the final customers home.
node.name: HubInjection-1_choice_1

node.description: Specify the RHD hub where the goods will be handed over to RHD.
node.name: InjectionHub

node.description: The type of the location.
node.name: LocationType-1

node.description: Code of the location.
node.name: LocationCode-1

node.description: Goods will be delivered directly to the RHD location which is responsible for delivering to the customers home.
node.name: DirectInjection-1_choice_1

node.description: Specify the RHD location where the goods will be handed over to RHD. Needs to be transmitted at least one day before the goods will be delivered to the RHD depot.
node.name: DirectInjectionLocation

node.description: The type of the location.
node.name: LocationType-2

node.description: Code of the location.
node.name: LocationCode-2

node.description: Goods should be picked up at customers home and returned to RHD location.
node.name: ReturnOrder-1_choice_1

node.description: The order is only about service as furniture assembly or other. No goods will be transported.
node.name: ServiceOnly-1_choice_1

node.description: Specify the freight terms for this order
node.name: FreightTerm

node.description: Unique customer order number
node.name: OrderNumber

node.description: Additional customer order number
node.name: OrderNumber2

node.description: Additional customer order number
node.name: OrderNumber3

node.description: If this order is linked to another order, you can transmit the refernced order number.
node.name: ReferenceOrderNumber

node.description: Customer number
node.name: CustomerNumber

node.description: Specify if the order should be created, updated or canceled
node.name: TransmissionCommand

node.description: Specify if the order should be held. If set to true, the order will be held in the RHD hub until it's released by setting hold=TRUE.
node.name: Hold

node.description: If the order is updated the system can verify via the sequence number, that all previous updates have been received. Provided by sender.
node.name: SequenceNumber

node.description: Abbreviation of the sender. This must map to a sender (organisational unit of the client) as listed in the master data at RHD.
node.name: SenderAbbreviation

node.description: Date and time when the order was placed
node.name: OrderCreation

node.description: Address of the final customer, used for correspondence or invoicing
node.name: CustomerAddress

node.description: Salutation towards person or company
node.name: Salutation

node.description: Title of person
node.name: Title

node.description: Persons last name or company name
node.name: Name

node.description: Persons first name
node.name: FirstName

node.description: Additional address information
node.name: AdditionalAddressLine

node.description: House number
node.name: HouseNumber

node.description: Postal code
node.name: PostalCode

node.description: Country of address; ISO-2-Alpha-Country-Code according to ISO 3166
node.name: Country

node.description: Phone number 1 for contacting the person/company
node.name: Phone1

node.description: Additional phone number 2 for contacting the person/company
node.name: Phone2

node.description: Additional phone number 3 for contacting the person/company
node.name: Phone3

node.description: Address for contacting the person/company via email
node.name: EMail

node.description: Fax number for contacting the person/company
node.name: Fax

node.description: Floor information of this address
node.name: Floor

node.description: Destination address for deliveries or pickup address for return orders.
node.name: ShipmentAddress

node.description: Salutation towards person or company
node.name: Salutation-1

node.description: Title of person
node.name: Title-1

node.description: Persons last name or company name
node.name: Name-1

node.description: Persons first name
node.name: FirstName-1

node.description: Additional address information
node.name: AdditionalAddressLine-1

node.description: House number
node.name: HouseNumber-1

node.description: Postal code
node.name: PostalCode-1

node.description: Country of address; ISO-2-Alpha-Country-Code according to ISO 3166
node.name: Country-1

node.description: Phone number 1 for contacting the person/company
node.name: Phone1-1

node.description: Additional phone number 2 for contacting the person/company
node.name: Phone2-1

node.description: Additional phone number 3 for contacting the person/company
node.name: Phone3-1

node.description: Address for contacting the person/company via email
node.name: EMail-1

node.description: Fax number for contacting the person/company
node.name: Fax-1

node.description: Floor information of this address
node.name: Floor-1

node.description: Desired date for delivery/pickup at customers address.
node.name: DesiredDate

node.description: Fixed date for delivery/pickup at customers address already agreed with the customer.
node.name: FixedDate

node.description: Earliest time for delivery/pickup at customers address.
node.name: EarliestTime

node.description: Latest time for delivery/pickup at customers address.
node.name: LatestTime

node.description: Amount for cash on delivery incl. costs. If the order has to be delivered with COD, than this amount is mandatory.
node.name: CashOnDelivery

node.description: The value of an amount with two decimal digits. An point (".") has to be used as decimal separator, comma is not allowed.
node.name: AmountValue

node.description: Currency of the amount as ISO 4217 three alpha code.
node.name: AmountCurrency

node.description: Service costs related to the order
node.name: TotalServiceCosts

node.description: The value of an amount with two decimal digits. An point (".") has to be used as decimal separator, comma is not allowed.
node.name: AmountValue-1

node.description: Currency of the amount as ISO 4217 three alpha code.
node.name: AmountCurrency-1

node.description: Total article value of the order
node.name: TotalArticleValue

node.description: The value of an amount with two decimal digits. An point (".") has to be used as decimal separator, comma is not allowed.
node.name: AmountValue-2

node.description: Currency of the amount as ISO 4217 three alpha code.
node.name: AmountCurrency-2

node.description: Volume of the complete order in cbm
node.name: Volume

node.description: Weight of the complete order in kg
node.name: Weight

node.description: Remark on order level
node.name: Remark

node.description: Used for booking deliveries and pickups.
node.name: TransportPosition

node.description: Number of the order position
node.name: PositionNumber

node.description: Type of service
node.name: TransportType

node.description: Number of the article. Usually somithing like EAN.
node.name: ArticleNumber

node.description: Description of the article as it should be printed on the documents.
node.name: ArticleDescription

node.description: Quantity of the transport position
node.name: Quantity

node.description: Stock Type
node.name: Quality

node.description: Date when the goods will be delivered to the RHD location.
node.name: InjectionDate

node.description: The bordereau number or equivalent information for identification of the transport of the goods to the RHD location.
node.name: InjectionBordereau

node.description: The value of one article (without VAT).
node.name: ArticleValue

node.description: The value of an amount with two decimal digits. An point (".") has to be used as decimal separator, comma is not allowed.
node.name: AmountValue-3

node.description: Currency of the amount as ISO 4217 three alpha code.
node.name: AmountCurrency-3

node.description: Weight of one article within order in kg
node.name: ArticleWeight

node.description: Volume of one article within order in cbm
node.name: ArticleVolume

node.description: Number of Packages per one Article
node.name: PackageQuantity

node.description: The unique barcode number of a package of this position. One position can consist of multiple packages. Please specify every barcode.
node.name: ItemBarcode

node.description: Remark on transport position level.
node.name: Remark-1

node.description: Used for booking services like assemblies, removals or other.
node.name: ServicePosition

node.description: Number of the service position.
node.name: PositionNumber-1

node.description: Type of service.
node.name: ServiceType

node.description: Quantity of the service position.
node.name: Quantity-1

node.description: Remark on service position level.
node.name: Remark-2

node.description: One or more key/value-pairs with additional information on the order.
node.name: OrderAttribute

node.description: The key or description of the attribute.
node.name: AttributeKey

node.description: The value/content of the attribute.
node.name: AttributeValue

field.name: AttributeValue

variable.description: Lobster_pro: id of current user
contains the path of the file read by cron job (type file operation)
0=productive, 1=test, 2=standby; will be initialized by system.
contains jobnr of the first convertion of a file compound
the mail subject - if it is a mail
Lobster_pro: optional - The filename of profile download result. If VAR_CONTENT_TYPE is empty, the content type will be determined by the filename extension.
single content of failed data
Lobster_pro: id of current user role
Orig. file name without suffix
contains the path of the archived mail
Message ID of received data
Backup file name
contains the mail body
is true if this is a restart of a (failed) job
Lobster_pro: optional - If true the response data must be a server XML and will be unmarshalled from server.
contains the amount of records
the input data size
Lobster_pro: id of current user company
set to true if there are invalid records in phase 3
Lobster_pro: username of current user
Lobster_pro: xml of current company
number of parsed lines of csv, excel, idoc and fix records files
Lobster_pro: optional - Fill this variable with an Error Response XML to resolve as an error.
Orig. file name
is true on last received file of ssh/ftp/oftp incoming transfer; applies only if process on logout is set
Factory ID of DMZ
the current profile name
the file time stamp or current time of the event
the sender addresses - if suitable
Lobster_pro: xml of current user
Lobster_pro: optional - The content type (Mime Type) of profile download result.
the current job number
set to true if there are sql erros in phase 4
contains the path of the archive-entry
contains the exception message if an error occurred
Lobster_pro: optional - Overrides the content disposition header with this content of profile download result. Sample 1: inline Sample 2: attachment; filename='DOWNLOAD.pdf'
appended content of failed data
LF-delimited list of read-in excel sheets
the destination of a oftp message
contains the mail recipient address(es)
true if this is not a test run
contains the name of the archive
content of ftp ctrl file - if set
contains the current record number where the exception occurred
contains oftp file counter
true if this is a test run
the originator of a oftp message - may differ from VAR_SENDER
Amount of validation errors
Lobster_pro: optional - If true and VAR_PROCESS_XML is true, the response will be merged into input data like an import.
is true if this is the last file within an archive container
Version id of the profile

parameter.key: Remove given prefix from field or node name
Write values containing white spaces only
Use XML short form for empty fields
Write xml in a single line

responsesettings.err_text: Original file name: {--@VAR_FILENAME@--} Job reference number: {--@VAR_JOBNR@--}
